title: Delicious Cake Shop
description: make and decorate delicious vanilla, chocolate or strawberry cakes for your loyal customers! Add awesome colorful bows, hearts, sprinkles or fruit pieces on top of your marvelous cakes and have fun cooking and serving yummy desserts! Got any ideas? Suggestions? Need technical support?
